name: breatheLoop
purpose: Sanftes, langsames Atmen — kontinuierliches Ein-/Ausblenden der Opazitaet (nur opacity, compositor-guenstig; bewusst langsam).
template:
{{css target}} { animation: motion-breatheLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
@keyframes motion-breatheLoop-{{css id}} { from { opacity: {{css params.minOpacity}} } to { opacity: 1 } }
